Theme status

6 themes (6 shipping) · auto-regenerated by bin/build-theme-status.py after every check.yml run.

  • green = pass / healthy / <=7d
  • yellow = warn / <=30d / review needed
  • red = fail / >30d / unreachable
  • grey = unknown / skipped / n/a
Theme StageBoot smokeBaseline ageMicrocopy distinctImages uniqueVision reviewed Owner Summary
aeroshippingunknown3.4dpasspassneedednickY2K iridescent WooCommerce block theme: holographic pastels, glassy chrome buttons, sparkle product cards, and a bubbly wordmark for soft-future storefronts.
chonkshippingunknown6.0dpasspassneedednickNeo-brutalist WooCommerce block theme: cream backgrounds, pure black 4px borders, hard offset shadows, chunky display type, zero rounded corners.
foundryshippingunknown3.2dpasspassneedednickEditorial WooCommerce block theme with hairline borders, generous whitespace, and a warm cream palette; a sibling register to Obel.
lysholmshippingunknown2.5dpasspassneedednickNordic home-goods WooCommerce block theme: pale cream surfaces, soft tan accents, unhurried serif typography for slow, considered storefronts.
obelshippingunknown2.5dpasspassneedednickEditorial WooCommerce block theme with hairline borders, generous whitespace, and a warm cream palette for quiet, measured storefronts.
selvedgeshippingunknown2.5dpasspassneedednickWorkwear-heritage WooCommerce block theme: warm dark palette, italic display serif, small-batch maker's voice for goods built to outlast you.
